title: Add DI Startup Failure Logging and Health Check Endpoints
description: Research Report R2-006 (Confidence 87%, High). If planner DI registration fails, the hosted service may not start and the failure can be silently swallowed. Risks undetected agent downtime.\\n\\nConfirmed by code audit (SteveBot 2026-06-26):\\n- Program.cs has zero try/catch around any GetRequiredService<T>() call\\n- AgentBackgroundService constructor (line 330-355) resolves 12 dependencies in a row — any missing registration throws InvalidOperationException\\n- Serilog may not be booted when DI throws, so error goes to stderr/console only\\n- All agent services are inside `if (agentEnabled)` block (line 87) — any failure inside is fatal\\n\\nFix:\\n1. **Wrap GetRequiredService calls in try/catch** at the AgentBackgroundService factory (line 330-355):\\n   - Catch InvalidOperationException, log via Console.Error.WriteLine (Serilog not guaranteed)\\n   - Include the missing type name in the error message\\n   - Re-throws after logging (crash-fast is better than silent failure)\\n2. **Add a /health endpoint** that reports DI registration status:\\n   - Map a minimal endpoint that lists registered services\\n   - Or: check if AgentBackgroundService is resolvable (try/catch GetRequiredService)\\n   - Return 200 OK with service names, or 503 if agent services aren't registered\\n3. **Add structured lifecycle logging** in AgentBackgroundService:\\n   - Log Information on StartAsync entry\\n   - Log Information on StopAsync entry with reason\\n   - Log Warning on ExecuteAsync exception before rethrow\\n4. **Add startup check** in Program.cs after builder.Build():\\n   - Try resolving key services and LogInformation on success\\n   - LogWarning on any resolution failure with specific type name\\n\\nFiles:\\n- WebUI.Blazor/Program.cs:330-355 (AgentBackgroundService factory with 12 GetRequiredService calls)\\n- WebUI.Blazor/Program.cs:87 (agentEnabled guard block)\\n- WebUI.Blazor/AgentBackgroundService.cs:StartAsync, ExecuteAsync, StopAsync\\n\\nSource: research-MemorySmith.Agent Codebase Audit Sprint-35, Council Addendum 2026-06-26. Code audit: SteveBot 2026-06-26.,\\n\\n  \"type\": \"Task\",\\n\\n  \"status\": \"Ready\",\\n\\n  \"priority\": \"High\",\\n\\n  \"assigneeMode\": \"Custom\",\\n\\n  \"assigneeDirectoryId\": null,\\n\\n  \"assigneeCustomText\": \"Agent\",\\n\\n  \"reporter\": \"anonymous\",\\n\\n  \"labels\": [\\n\\n    \"sprint-51\",\\n\\n    \"council\",\\n\\n    \"di\",\\n\\n    \"health\",\\n\\n    \"logging\"\\n\\n  ],\\n\\n  \"attachments\": [],\\n\\n  \"externalLinks\": [],\\n\\n  \"linkedPages\": [],\\n\\n  \"comments\": [],\\n\\n  \"epicId\": null,\\n\\n  \"parentId\": null,\\n\\n  \"dueDateUtc\": null,\\n\\n  \"createdAtUtc\": \"2026-06-27T00:33:27.4202795Z\",\\n\\n  \"updatedAtUtc\": \"2026-06-27T00:33:27.4202795Z\",\\n\\n  \"completedAtUtc\": null,\\n\\n  \"revision\": 1,\\n\\n  \"isArchived\": false,\\n\\n  \"hasLoadError\": false,\\n\\n  \"loadError\": null,\\n\\n  \"sourceFilePath\": null\\n\\n}\\n\\n
